round_1.description: Truncation and missing entrypoint — most common failure classes (57% + 24% of failures)

round_2.description: Hallucinated functions and syntax errors — compiler-level failures (12% + 7% of failures). epochs=1 + higher dropout prevents overfitting on small dataset (5 records); overfitting with epochs=2 caused compile regression on unrelated tasks.

round_3.description: Geometry reasoning and algorithm mismatch — hard logic failures requiring deeper reasoning

round_4.description: Runtime errors and I/O format errors — output correctness failures

round_geometry_v1.description: Geometry task direct retry — targets 2025_midterm_003 (Triangle Enumeration, score=15). Topic-filtered from benchmark failed_cases.jsonl + global dataset. Strict validation: requires scanf + printf. r=16 for deeper geometry reasoning.
